summary: Quick Actions Menu | Hearing Announcement When Entering the Menu
description:
GIVEN the user is playing back video content
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user focuses on the Quick Actions Menu
steps.result: THEN the user will hear: “In the Quick Actions Menu, <Option Name>, x out of y options. Press select to <quick_actions>, Press <appropriate_directions> for more quick actions options, Press down for player controls, Press back to dismiss controls.”
